hero.subtitle: Grinta gives coaches a single tool to plan the season, build microcycles, and prepare training — from youth academy to the first team, under one playing method.
hero.tagline: One club. One identity. One method.

manifesto.title: Three words, etched on every screen.
manifesto.body: Grinta is not a shared calendar. It's the tool that forces alignment between the club's philosophy, the season plan, and Tuesday night's training.

pillars.title: One club
pillars.body: From youth academy to the first team, every category shares one single workspace.

pillars.title: One identity
pillars.body: Set the club's playing principles. Every coach finds them in their microcycles and sessions.

pillars.title: One method
pillars.body: Macro, meso, microcycles, sessions: one continuous thread. Plan the season once, then break it down.

steps.title: The club's identity
steps.body: Playing principles, development, expectations. One philosophy shared across the whole staff.

steps.title: The season, in 90 seconds
steps.body: Three dates are enough. Grinta anchors the macrocycle and numbers the weeks (-3, -2, -1, +1…) automatically.

steps.title: The microcycles
steps.body: Weekly theme, format, load. Every mesocycle takes whatever color you want.

steps.title: The sessions
steps.body: Import an exercise from your library or build it right on the diagram. Blocks stack up.

steps.title: The sheet, pitch-ready
steps.body: A clean A4 PDF, readable for staff, usable on the pitch. That's it.

steps.title: Attendance and availability
steps.body: Track attendance, absences and availability to keep a clear view of every squad.

steps.title: TIPS follow-up
steps.body: Centralize technical, intelligent, personal and social observations to support each player over time.

steps.title: Roster management
steps.body: Keep clean player records, assign players to teams and quickly find important information.

steps.title: BDNS export
steps.body: Prepare the data needed for administration and save time on recurring exports.

pricing.title: Free for a coach. Fair for a club.

tiers.name: Club
notes: Billed monthly, per team — cancel anytime

finalCta.body: Account in 30 seconds. No credit card. You can import the current season and pick up where you left off.

footer.tagline: The tool for football coaches and clubs to plan the season, build microcycles, and prepare training.

mentions-legales.title: Legal notice
mentions-legales.intro: This legal notice applies to the Grinta website and application. Grinta is operated from Switzerland and governed by Swiss law.

sections.heading: Publisher
body: Grinta — [Exact company name], [Legal form].
Address: [Street and number], [Postal code] [City], Switzerland.
Business identification number (UID): [CHE-xxx.xxx.xxx].
Contact: contact@grinta.app.

sections.heading: Hosting
body: The application is hosted by Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States, on a cloud infrastructure that may include data centres located in the European Union.

As a transfer of data to the United States may occur, appropriate safeguards (in particular standard contractual clauses) are put in place in accordance with the revFADP. For any hosting-related question, write to contact@grinta.app.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
body: All content of the website and application (the Grinta brand, logos, texts, interfaces, code, methodology) is protected under Swiss intellectual property law and remains the exclusive property of the publisher or its partners.
Any reproduction, representation or use, in whole or in part, without prior written authorisation is prohibited.

sections.heading: Liability
body: The publisher strives to ensure the accuracy and availability of the information provided, without being able to guarantee it. Its liability cannot be engaged for any damage resulting from the use of the website or application, within the limits permitted by Swiss law.
Links to third-party sites are provided for information only; the publisher exercises no control over their content.

sections.heading: Governing law and jurisdiction
body: This notice is governed by Swiss law. The exclusive place of jurisdiction is the registered office of the publisher, subject to any mandatory jurisdiction provided by law.

cgv.title: Terms of sale
cgv.intro: These general terms and conditions (GTC) govern the subscription to and use of Grinta's paid plans. They are governed by Swiss law, in particular the Swiss Code of Obligations (CO).

sections.heading: Purpose and scope
body: These GTC govern the contractual relationship between the publisher of Grinta and any customer subscribing to a plan. Subscribing to a plan constitutes unconditional acceptance of these GTC.

sections.heading: Plans and prices
body: The features and prices of the plans are described on the Pricing page of the website. Prices are stated in Swiss francs (CHF), including taxes where applicable.
The publisher reserves the right to change its prices; any change is communicated to the customer before renewal and does not apply to the current period already paid.

sections.heading: Payment
body: Payment is made using the means offered at subscription, through a third-party payment provider. The plan is activated after payment confirmation.
In the event of non-payment, the publisher may suspend or terminate access to the service after an unsuccessful reminder.

sections.heading: Term and termination
body: The plan is concluded for the chosen period (monthly or yearly) and renews automatically for an identical period, unless cancelled before the renewal date.
The customer may cancel at any time from their account or by writing to contact@grinta.app; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current period, with no refund for the period already started.

sections.heading: Right of withdrawal
body: Swiss law does not provide a general right of withdrawal for contracts concluded online. The customer acknowledges that access to the digital service begins as soon as the plan is activated.

sections.heading: Availability and liability
body: The publisher provides the service with due care but does not guarantee uninterrupted availability. Its liability is limited to direct damage and, to the fullest extent permitted by Swiss law, excluded for indirect damage.
The customer remains responsible for the accuracy of the data they enter and for backing up their content.

sections.heading: Governing law and jurisdiction
body: These GTC are governed by Swiss law. Any dispute falls under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at the publisher's registered office, subject to any mandatory jurisdiction.

confidentialite.title: Privacy policy
confidentialite.intro: This policy describes how Grinta processes personal data, in accordance with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (revFADP). Where users in the European Union are concerned, the GDPR may also apply.

sections.heading: Data controller
body: The data controller is the publisher of Grinta — [Exact company name], [Postal code] [City], Switzerland.
For any data protection question: contact@grinta.app.

sections.heading: Data collected
body: Account data: name, email address, club and role.
Usage data: content created in the application (teams, players, sessions, evaluations) and technical logs required for operation.
Payment data: handled by our payment provider; we do not store full card details.

sections.heading: Purposes and legal basis
body: Data is processed to provide and secure the service, manage subscriptions, provide support and improve the application.
Processing is based on the performance of the contract, consent where required, and the publisher's legitimate interests, in accordance with the revFADP.

sections.heading: Disclosure of data
body: Data may be disclosed to processors (hosting, payment, email) acting on the publisher's instructions and bound by confidentiality.
In the event of a transfer outside Switzerland or the EU/EEA, appropriate safeguards are put in place in accordance with the revFADP.

sections.heading: Retention period
body: Data is kept for as long as necessary for the purposes described and for the duration of the contractual relationship, then deleted or anonymised subject to legal retention obligations.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: In accordance with the revFADP, you have the right of access, rectification, erasure and objection, as well as the right to data portability.
To exercise these rights, write to contact@grinta.app. You may also contact the Federal Data Protection and Information Commissioner (FDPIC).

sections.heading: Security
body: The publisher implements appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect data against unauthorised access, loss or alteration.

stepMain.librarySubtitle: Whole library · sorted by relevance with the session focus

step5.title: Finish, cool down, remember
step5.subtitle: The final moment checks the theme in a free situation, then closes the session with a short debrief and notes useful for next time.

placeholder.format: Format, rules, constraints, last coaching points.

step5.librarySubtitle: Whole library · click to import into the final game
